title: Department of Environmental Protection Single Use Plastics FY25 Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Executive Office of Energy and Environmental Affairs (pursuant to line item 2200-0107 of Section 2 of Chapter 140 of the Acts of 2024) submitting its Department of Environmental Protection’s report on the development and administration of a grant program for small businesses to support alternatives to single-use plastics
